title: sorry: constant selects in always_* processes are not currently supported

features.name: constant part select inside always_comb
features.description: Code should include a constant-bound part select on a signal inside an always_comb procedural block
features.snippet:
always_comb begin
    if (ac >= {1'b0,y1}) begin
        {ac_next, q1_next} = {ac_next[WIDTH-1:0], q1, 1'b1};
    end
end

features.name: concatenation with part select operand
features.description: Code should include a concatenation where one operand is a part-selected signal
